name: Refuel
summary: Rapid fuel transfer for ships returning from patrol, trade or survey operations.

name: Repair
summary: Hull patching, structural reinforcement and emergency restoration for worn vessels.

name: Rearm
summary: Standard ammunition replenishment and ordnance handling under deck supervision.

name: Shipyard
summary: Limited storage slots available while outbound expedition craft remain in berth.
note: Reserve requests are prioritized for long-range support pilots.

name: Outfitting
summary: A curated stock of exploration, logistics and survival modules.

name: Universal Cartographics
summary: Survey data accepted daily with expedited review for deep-space teams.

name: Vista Genomics
summary: Exobiology sample intake and secure transfer to certified analysis channels.

name: Redemption Office
summary: Claims are processed in rotating windows while legal ledgers are synchronized.
note: Expect modest delays during carrier jump cycles.

name: Bartender
summary: Social deck open with trade gossip, mission chatter and a strong synth-coffee menu.

name: Secure Warehouse
summary: Protected cargo lockers and bonded storage for approved commercial contracts.
note: Storage control is temporarily sealed for inventory reconciliation.
